mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_work_hour_config ( calc_type, monthly_work_days, morning_start_time, morning_end_time, afternoon_start_time, afternoon_end_time, daily_work_hours, overtime_start_time, min_overtime_hours, weekday_overtime_rate, weekday_overtime_hourly, restday_overtime_rate, restday_overtime_hourly, holiday_overtime_rate, holiday_overtime_hourly, status, created_by_id, created_by_name, remark ) VALUES ( #{calcType}, #{monthlyWorkDays}, #{morningStartTime}, #{morningEndTime}, #{afternoonStartTime}, #{afternoonEndTime}, #{dailyWorkHours}, #{overtimeStartTime}, #{minOvertimeHours}, #{weekdayOvertimeRate}, #{weekdayOvertimeHourly}, #{restdayOvertimeRate}, #{restdayOvertimeHourly}, #{holidayOvertimeRate}, #{holidayOvertimeHourly}, #{status}, #{createdById}, #{createdByName}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_work_hour_config SET calc_type = #{calcType}, monthly_work_days = #{monthlyWorkDays}, morning_start_time = #{morningStartTime}, morning_end_time = #{morningEndTime}, afternoon_start_time = #{afternoonStartTime}, afternoon_end_time = #{afternoonEndTime}, daily_work_hours = #{dailyWorkHours}, overtime_start_time = #{overtimeStartTime}, min_overtime_hours = #{minOvertimeHours}, weekday_overtime_rate = #{weekdayOvertimeRate}, weekday_overtime_hourly = #{weekdayOvertimeHourly}, restday_overtime_rate = #{restdayOvertimeRate}, restday_overtime_hourly = #{restdayOvertimeHourly}, holiday_overtime_rate = #{holidayOvertimeRate}, holiday_overtime_hourly = #{holidayOvertimeHourly}, status = #{status}, approved_by_id = #{approvedById}, approved_by_name = #{approvedByName}, approved_time = #{approvedTime}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark}, remark = #{remark} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_work_hour_config ORDER BY status DESC, calc_type ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_work_hour_config WHERE calc_type = #{calcType} AND status = 2 LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tb_work_hour_config WHERE calc_type = #{calcType} ORDER BY status DESC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_work_hour_config SET status = #{status}, approved_by_id = #{approvedById}, approved_by_name = #{approvedByName}, approved_time = #{approvedTime}, approve_remark = #{approveRemark} WHERE id = #{id}
